documentation:
[![General CI](https://github.com/siliconcompiler/scgallery/actions/workflows/general_ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/siliconcompiler/scgallery/actions/workflows/general_ci.yml)
[![Lint](https://github.com/siliconcompiler/scgallery/actions/workflows/lint.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/siliconcompiler/scgallery/actions/workflows/lint.yml)

# SiliconCompiler Design Gallery
Design gallery for [SiliconCompiler](https://github.com/silicompiler/siliconcompiler).
This library uses the rtl2gds flow in SiliconCompiler to compile the designs from RTL to a GDS file.

![Gallery](images/montage.jpg)

# To install:
Utilize the same python environment as SiliconCompiler.

    git clone https://github.com/siliconcompiler/scgallery.git
    cd scgallery
    python3 -m pip install .

# To run a design:

    sc-gallery -design sha512  # Will run on all supported targets
    sc-gallery -design sha512 -target asap7_demo  # Will only run on asap7
    sc-gallery -target asap7_demo  # Will run all designs supported on asap7
    sc-gallery  # Will run all designs on all targets

# Extending with proprietary design and technologies:

    sc-gallery -gallery private.gallery -design aes  # Will run on all supported targets in your private gallery
    sc-gallery -gallery private.gallery  # Will run all designs on all targets in your private gallery

# To check, create, and update rules:

    python3 -m scgallery.rules -cfg <cfg> -rules <rules> -check  # Check if run met the rule requirements.
    python3 -m scgallery.rules -cfg <cfg> -rules <rules> -create  # Create an initial set of rules.
    python3 -m scgallery.rules -cfg <cfg> -rules <rules> -update_all  # Update rules based on the run.
    python3 -m scgallery.rules -cfg <cfg> -rules <rules> -tighten_passing  # Update passing rules based on the run.
    python3 -m scgallery.rules -cfg <cfg> -rules <rules> -update_failing  # Update failing rules based on the run.

# Contributing

## To add a design:
1. Create a folder with the design name (\<design\>) in scgallery/designs
2. add source files to scgallery/designs/\<design\>/src
3. add constraints to scgallery/designs/\<design\>/constraints (using the name of the library it is associated with)
4. create scgallery/designs/\<design\>/\<design\>.py
5. add the design to [scgallery/designs/\_\_init\_\_.py](scgallery/designs/__init__.py)

# Issues / Bugs

We use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/siliconcompiler/scgallery/issues)
for tracking requests and bugs.

# License

[Apache License 2.0](LICENSE)

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.name
documentation:
Name of the gallery

Returns:
    str/None: Name of gallery

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.has_name
documentation:
Determine if the gallery has a name

Returns:
    boolean: True, if a name is present, False if not

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.title
documentation:
Title string for the gallery

Returns:
    str: Title for the gallery

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.path
documentation:
Path to the gallery

Returns:
    str: Absolute path to the gallery

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_path
documentation:
Set the path to the gallery.

The path will be converted to an absolute path

Parameters:
    path (str): path to the gallery output

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.add_target
documentation:
Add a target to the gallery.

Parameters:
    name (str): name of the target
    module (module): python module for the target

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.remove_target
documentation:
Removes a target from the gallery.

Parameters:
    name (str): name of the target to remove

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.get_targets
documentation:
Get a list of target names registered in the gallery.

Returns:
    list (str): List of target names

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.add_design
documentation:
Add a design to the gallery.

Parameters:
    name (str): name of the design
    module (module): python module for the design
    rules (list [path]): list of paths to the rules for this design
    setup (list [function]): list of functions to help configure the design in external
        galleries

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.remove_design
documentation:
Removes a design from the gallery.

Parameters:
    name (str): name of the design to remove

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.get_design
documentation:
Gets the configuration for a design.

Returns:
    dict: Configuration of a design

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.get_designs
documentation:
Get a list of design names registered in the gallery.

Returns:
    list (str): List of design names

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_remote
documentation:
Set the path to the remote credentials file.

Parameters:
    remote (str): path to the credentials

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.is_remote
documentation:
Determine if the gallery is set to run remotely

Returns:
    boolean: True, if running remotely, False if not

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_clean
documentation:
Set if the gallery should clean a previous run.

Parameters:
    clean (boolean): Flag to indicate if clean should be used

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.is_clean
documentation:
Determine if the gallery is set to clean a previous run

Returns:
    boolean: True, if resuming, False if not

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_strict
documentation:
Set if the gallery should use strict mode when running siliconcompiler.

Parameters:
    strict (boolean): Flag to indicate if strict should be used

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.is_strict
documentation:
Determine if the gallery is set to strict mode

Returns:
    boolean: True, if using strict, False if not

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_rules_to_skip
documentation:
Set rules to skip during checks

Parameters:
    rules (list): List of glob rules

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.rules_to_skip
documentation:
Set of rules to skip at the end of run checks.

Returns:
    list: List of rules to skip during checks

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.add_design_rule
documentation:
Add a new rules file to a design.

Parameters:
    design (str): name of the design
    rule (path): path to the rules for this design

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.get_design_rules
documentation:
Get a list of rules for the design.

Parameters:
    design (str): name of the design

Returns:
    list (path): list of paths to rules files

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.clear_design_rules
documentation:
Removes all design rules from a design.

Parameters:
    design (str): name of the design

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.add_design_setup
documentation:
Add a new setup function to a design.

Parameters:
    name (str): name of the design
    setup (function): functions to help configure the design in external
        galleries

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.get_design_setup
documentation:
Get a list of setup functions to a design.

Parameters:
    name (str): name of the design

Returns:
    list (function): list of functions to setup the design

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_jobname_suffix
documentation:
Sets a suffix to the default job names.

Parameters:
    suffix (str): string to append to the job names during a gallery run.

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.register_lambdalib
documentation:
Sets a suffix to the default job names.

Parameters:
    pdk (str): pdk this library belongs to.
    mainlib (str): main library to match this library to, can be a glob.
    library (module): module to load.
    swaps (list of (str, str)]): library pairs to swap to perform techmapping.
    add_macrolibs (boolean): add additional macros libraries

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_run_designs
documentation:
Sets the designs to execute during a run.

Parameters:
    designs (list [str]): list of design names

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.set_run_targets
documentation:
Sets the targets to use during a run.

Parameters:
    targets (list [str]): list of target names

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.__design_has_target_option
documentation:
Checks if a design as a setup function with a target argument.
If false, this design cannot be matrixed with targets

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.__design_needs_target
documentation:
Checks if the design has 'gallery_needs_target' set and returns the value.
This will default to true.

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.lint
documentation: Run lint on the enabled designs.

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.run
documentation:
Main run function which will iterate over the design gallery and generate images and
summaries for the listed designs and targets.

Returns:
    boolean: True, if all designs succeeded and no rules were violated, False otherwise.

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.summary
documentation: Print a summary of the previous run.

methods.name: scgallery.gallery.Gallery.main
documentation: Main method to initiate the gallery from the commandline.
